system.description:
You upgrade 1 of your Inventions or Gadgets at every level from 3 onwards (except level 19).

How it works in Foundry: on level-up you'll be prompted to pick 1 upgrade from the combined list of all Invention/Gadget upgrades. The picked upgrade is added to your character sheet as its own feature with the parent invention/gadget named in the title (e.g. Manaforged Plate · Angled Deflectors). Mechanical upgrades like Angled Deflectors (+2 Armor) and Passive Sensors (+INT Initiative) apply automatically; description-only upgrades are reference notes you cite at the table.

Each upgrade can only be picked once per item — pick only upgrades for Inventions/Gadgets you own. You may reconfigure picks during a Safe Rest by editing them on the sheet.
